Home / Services / Deck & Patio Construction

Deck & Patio Construction

Extend your living space outdoors with a custom-built deck or patio.

San Diego's beautiful weather makes outdoor living a priority. We specialize in designing and building custom decks and patios that enhance your outdoor living experience. Whether you're looking for a simple patio for grilling and dining or a multi-level deck with a built-in spa, we can help you create the perfect outdoor space. We use weather-resistant materials and construction techniques to ensure that your deck or patio is built to last. We consider the unique challenges of San Diego's climate, such as intense sun exposure and salt air corrosion, when selecting materials and designing your outdoor space. We handle all aspects of the project, from initial design and permitting to complete construction and finishing. We are experienced in working with a variety of materials, including wood, composite decking, concrete, and pavers.

Our Process

  1. 01 Step 1: Design Consultation and Planning
  2. 02 Step 2: Material Selection and Permitting
  3. 03 Step 3: Site Preparation and Construction
  4. 04 Step 4: Finishing and Landscaping

Benefits

  • Increased Outdoor Living Space
  • Enhanced Home Value
  • Improved Aesthetics
  • Relaxation and Entertainment

Frequently Asked Questions

What materials are best for decks and patios in San Diego?

Composite decking and redwood are popular choices for decks in San Diego, as they are durable and resistant to weather damage. Concrete and pavers are good options for patios.

Do I need a permit to build a deck or patio?

In most cases, you will need a permit to build a deck or patio. We can help you navigate the permitting process.

How much does it cost to build a deck or patio?

The cost of building a deck or patio depends on the size, materials, and design. We provide detailed estimates and work with you to stay within your budget.

Get a Free Estimate
